processingSteps.name: Community detection
processingSteps.description: Detects communities of participants based on reposting behaviors in the merged reposting network.

processingSteps.name: Hexagonal map layout construction
processingSteps.description: Builds the D-Map layout by force-directed placement, compacting gaps, and arranging nodes chronologically within communities.

quotes: detect communities of all the participants
choose a force-directed layout
delete the blanks among nodes and make the layout compact
evidence.reasoning: These processing steps directly support the construction of the D-Map view rather than only the global pipeline.
